status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 171, Number 8 (Wednesday, January 15, 2025)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Mr. STAUBER:
H.R. 452.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
This bill is enacted pursuant to the power granted to
Congress under Article I, Section 8, Clause 5 of the United
States Constitution.
[Page H187]
status.title: Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act

cosponsors.fullName: Del. Radewagen, Aumua Amata Coleman [R-AS-At Large]

committees.name: Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee

summaries.text:
Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act

This bill provides for the award of Congressional Gold Medals to the members of the 1980 U.S. Olympic men's ice hockey team in recognition of the team's achievement at the 1980 Winter Olympic Games.

Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act

This act provides for the award of Congressional Gold Medals to the members of the 1980 U.S. Olympic men's ice hockey team in recognition of the team's achievement at the 1980 Winter Olympic Games.
